prompt.content:
Assume the MTSI closing share price as of 01/02/2026 and a 30% bid premium. Calculate the MTSI equity and enterprise values before and after the bid premium using the model. In addition, show the EV/Sales and EV/EBITDA multiples at bid premium. 

Round all numerical values except for share price to thousands with $ signs and no decimals, and multiples to one decimal.
